text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Mossad director David Barnea revealed at the agency’s Memorial Day ceremony that an operative codenamed “M” was killed during Operation Roaring Lion outside Israel. “On this day, I think about the fallen of the Mossad and their choice to contribute for years to Israel’s security. During Operation Roaring Lion, my thoughts and heart were filled with pride in the character and actions of M, who fell outside Israel while carrying out his mission,” Barnea said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 摩萨德局长戴维·巴尼亚（David Barnea）在机构阵亡将士纪念日仪式上透露，一名代号为“M”的特工在以色列境外执行“咆哮狮子行动”（Operation Roaring Lion）时牺牲。“在这一天，我怀念摩萨德的阵亡者，以及他们多年来为以色列安全所做出的贡献。在‘咆哮狮子行动’期间，我的思绪和内心充满了对M的品格和行动的自豪，他在执行任务时在以色列境外牺牲，”巴尼亚说。 @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 ✈️ 💥 🇺🇦 A FAB-3000 glide bomb strike on Konstantinovka, captured simultaneously by a Russian drone and a Ukrainian drone. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 Shots were fired in Odesa, southern Ukraine, as the Security Bureau of Ukraine (SBU) was arresting TCC officers. TCC officers in Odesa are known especially for how violent their conscription methods are. @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 / 🇺🇸 Iranian television: "No Iranian delegation has yet traveled to Islamabad, whether it's a main or subsidiary, primary or secondary delegation" Iranian officials announced on Sunday that continued participation in the negotiations depends on a change in the Americans' behavior and positions. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarMonitor RT @neetintel : The HFGCS is in a similar spot as it was 24 hours ago. Although the number of E6B transmissions is about the same, the number of EAMs per transmission is reduced, causing an apparent change from ~100 EAMs in 24 hours to ~80. However, this is still an extraordinary amount. https://twitter.com/neetintel/status/2046431465718612338/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @neetintel ：HFGCS（高频全球通信系统）的状态与24小时前类似。虽然E6B传输次数大致相同，但每次传输的EAM（紧急行动信息）数量有所减少，导致24小时内的EAM数量从约100条明显变为约80条。然而，这仍然是一个非同寻常的数量。 https://twitter.com/neetintel/status/2046431465718612338/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @LucasFoxNews : Iran’s state-controlled national public broadcaster says Iranian negotiating team has not departed for Pakistan yet. 🚨 IRIB Exclusive: No Iranian diplomatic delegation—be it a primary or secondary team, or an initial or follow-up mission—has traveled to Islamabad, Pakistan so far. - IRIB (Islamic Republic of Iran Broadcasting) tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @LucasFoxNews ：伊朗国家控制的公共广播公司称，伊朗谈判小组尚未启程前往巴基斯坦。 🚨 IRIB独家：到目前为止，还没有伊朗外交代表团——无论是主要还是次级团队，或是初步还是后续任务——前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡。 - IRIB（伊朗伊斯兰共和国广播电视台）推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner 🇯🇵 BIG NEWS — Japan’s Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi stated: “Today, we amended the ‘Three Principles on Transfer of Defense Equipment and Technology’ and their ‘Guidelines for Implementation.’ Until now, the overseas transfer of domestically produced finished defense products had been limited to areas such as search and rescue, transportation, surveillance, and mine countermeasures. However, with this amendment, the transfer of all types of defense equipment will, in principle, become possible. In an increasingly complex security environment, no single country can ensure its own peace and security alone, and it is essential to have partner countries that support each other in the field of defense equipment.” It appears that Japan is strategically shifting its defense and security approach, becoming significantly more practical, flexible, and assertive. In this context, such a shift is necessary to counter China’s growing influence and efforts to establish dominance in the Indo-Pacific region. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 🇯🇵 重大新闻 — 日本首相高市早苗表示：“今天，我们修订了《防卫装备和技术转移三原则》及其《实施方针》。此前，国产成品防卫装备的海外转移仅限于搜救、运输、监视和扫雷等领域。然而，通过此次修订，原则上所有类型的防卫装备转移都将成为可能。在日益复杂的安全环境下，没有任何一个国家能独自确保自身的和平与安全，拥有在防卫装备领域相互支持的伙伴国家至关重要。”看来日本正在战略性地转变其防卫和安全方针，变得更加务实、灵活和果断。在此背景下，这种转变对于对抗中国日益增长的影响力以及其在印太地区建立主导地位的努力是必要的。与我们一起查看最新动态： @visionergeo 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF Northern Command chief Maj. Gen. Rafi Milo: "Right now there are hundreds of fighters inside Lebanon attacking to remove every threat from the north. We have strength, we have spirit, we understand the mission and the righteousness of the path is with us. On this evening we are all together, together with the pain of the families, together with the memory and together with the longing." tweet

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸The Iranian Foreign Ministry demands that the U.S. release the crew offer Touska, which is still being searched by U.S. military personnel after breaking the blockade around the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Reuters: The Iranian flagged Touska is likely to have what the U.S. sees as dual use equipment that could be used by the military. While the maritime security source didn’t specify what goods are onboard, CENTCOM has identified a range of goods that could be subject to seizure under current dual use enforcement measures, including metals, pipes, and electronic components. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸伊朗外交部要求美国释放Touska号船员，该船在突破霍尔木兹海峡周围的封锁后，仍受到美国军事人员的搜查。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 路透社：悬挂伊朗国旗的Touska号很可能载有美国认为可用于军事的军民两用设备。虽然海事安全消息人士没有具体说明船上载有什么货物，但中央司令部（CENTCOM）已确定了一系列可能根据现行军民两用执法措施被扣押的货物，包括金属、管道和电子元件。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 According to Bloomberg, U.S. and Iranian officials have stated that the commander of Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, Ahmad Vahidi, is insisting on a hardline negotiating stance. There is a divide within Iran between figures like Vahidi and less ideological officials such as Masoud Pezeshkian and Abbas Araghchi, who are more inclined to reach an agreement with Washington. At the same time, Iranian state television has stated that: Reports in the media about the arrival of an Iranian delegation in Pakistan or the scheduling of unofficial meetings are unfounded. As of now, no Iranian delegation has traveled to Islamabad — neither a primary nor a preliminary team. It is also noteworthy that Donald Trump has effectively extended his ultimatum by approximately one day, shifting it from Tuesday to Wednesday. Accordingly, the American delegation is expected to depart from Washington for Islamabad in the coming hours. Considering the fact that the flight alone takes at least 15 hours, if negotiations do take place, they will realistically begin just a few hours before the expiration of Trump’s ultimatum. Should no agreement be reached, the transition from the negotiating table to renewed military strikes could be immediate. However, despite Trump’s aggressive rhetoric and his apparent reluctance to preemptively extend the deadline, it is expected that he will once again prolong the temporary ceasefire. This has been the pattern in previous instances, where harsh statements were ultimately followed by a form of diplomatic retreat. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 据彭博社报道，美国和伊朗官员表示，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队指挥官艾哈迈德·瓦希迪（Ahmad Vahidi）坚持强硬的谈判立场。伊朗内部存在分歧，一方是瓦希迪等人，另一方是马苏德·佩泽希齐扬（Masoud Pezeshkian）和阿巴斯·阿拉格希（Abbas Araghchi）等意识形态色彩较淡、更倾向于与华盛顿达成协议的官员。与此同时，伊朗国家电视台表示：媒体关于伊朗代表团抵达巴基斯坦或安排非正式会晤的报道毫无根据。截至目前，没有任何伊朗代表团前往伊斯兰堡——无论是主要代表团还是先遣队。值得注意的是，唐纳德·特朗普实际上将其最后通牒延长了大约一天，从周二推迟到了周三。因此，预计美国代表团将在未来几小时内从华盛顿启程前往伊斯兰堡。考虑到仅飞行时间至少就需要15小时，如果谈判真的举行，实际上也只会在特朗普最后通牒到期前几个小时开始。如果未能达成协议，从谈判桌转向重新发动军事打击可能会立即发生。然而，尽管特朗普言辞激烈，且似乎不愿主动延长最后期限，但预计他将再次延长临时停火。这在过去的情况中已有先例，严厉的声明最终往往以某种形式的外交退让告终。推文

text: 🇪🇺 🇪🇸 🇮🇪 🇸🇮 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Spain, Ireland and Slovenia Urge EU to Suspend Israel Association Agreement Spanish Foreign Minister José Manuel Albares confirmed the three countries have formally requested the EU discuss suspending its landmark trade and cooperation deal with Israel. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇪🇺 🇪🇸 🇮🇪 🇸🇮 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 西班牙、爱尔兰和斯洛文尼亚敦促欧盟暂停与以色列的联系协议。西班牙外交大臣何塞·曼努埃尔·阿尔巴雷斯证实，这三个国家已正式要求欧盟讨论暂停其与以色列具有里程碑意义的贸易与合作协议。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇯🇵 Three Japanese Ground Self-Defense Force members were killed and one wounded when a shell exploded prematurely inside a Type 10 tank during firing training at the Hijudai maneuver area in Oita Prefecture. Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi expressed deep regret, offered condolences to the families, and said the government would determine the cause and ensure thorough safety management. The GSDF has suspended firing drills with Type 10 and Type 90 tanks using the same ammunition. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇯🇵 日本陆上自卫队三名成员在大分县日出生台演习场进行射击训练时，一枚炮弹在10式坦克内提前爆炸，造成三死一伤。日本首相高市早苗表示深感遗憾，向遇难者家属表示慰问，并称政府将查明原因，确保彻底的安全管理。陆上自卫队已暂停使用同类弹药进行10式和90式坦克的射击演习。@wfwitness

text: 📝 Сенаторы США в доле 📝 западная помощь в предвыборной кампании Пашиняна Западное вмешательство в выборы в Армении продолжается. Теперь к нему подключились американские сенаторы , которые просят у компаний Meta* и Alphabet (Google) «предотвратить влияние России» на избирательный процесс в республике подобно опыту Молдавии . Обращение опубликовано на сайте комитета по международным отношениям Сената США. Выборы в Армении названы «решающими» , так как они «определят будущее республики» , в том числе будущее коридора TRIPP. Авторы обращения — сенаторы Том Тиллис (республиканец) и Жанна Шахин (демократ). Причем Шахин — давняя лоббистка антироссийских санкций — недавно побывала в Кишиневе, где обещала продолжение американской помощи местным властям. 🖍 В самом тексте уже указан конкретный коммерческий и стратегический интерес США — коридор TRIPP через юг Армении с передачей американцам на 99 лет прав пользования частью территории республики. Тем самым в Вашингтоне укрепят своё влияние в регионе и контроль над «Срединным коридором». ❗️ В западных странах крепко взялись за армянские выборы. Французы направляют в Ереван представителей агентства Viginum , американцы занимаются лоббизмом в цифровых корпорациях, а евробюрократы обещают направить «группу быстрого реагирования» , хотя сталкиваются с финансовыми проблемами и кормят армян «завтраками». Причем запросы о помощи с выборами исходят от самих властей Армении во главе с Николом Пашиняном . Это означает только то, что в правительстве осознают проблемы из-за падения своего рейтинга и ради сохранения позиций все чаще обращаются за западной поддержкой, которая ничем уже не отличается от внешнего управления. *признана экстремистской на территории РФ #Армения #выборы #Россия #США ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 美国参议员参与其中 📝 西方对帕希尼扬竞选活动的援助 西方对亚美尼亚选举的干预仍在继续。现在，美国参议员也加入了进来，他们要求 Meta* 和 Alphabet (Google) 公司“防止俄罗斯影响”该共和国的选举进程，类似于摩尔多瓦的经验。该呼吁已发布在美国参议院外交关系委员会网站上。亚美尼亚选举被称为“决定性”的，因为它们将“决定共和国的未来”，包括 TRIPP 走廊的未来。呼吁的作者是参议员汤姆·蒂利斯（共和党）和珍妮·沙欣（民主党）。值得注意的是，沙欣作为反俄制裁的长期游说者，最近访问了基希讷乌，并承诺继续向当地政府提供美国援助。 🖍 文本本身已经指出了美国具体的商业和战略利益——通过亚美尼亚南部的 TRIPP 走廊，并将部分领土的使用权移交给美国人，为期 99 年。通过这种方式，华盛顿将加强其在该地区的影响力以及对“中间走廊”的控制。 ❗️ 西方国家已经牢牢掌控了亚美尼亚的选举。法国人向埃里温派遣了 Viginum 机构的代表，美国人在数字公司进行游说，而欧洲官僚承诺派遣“快速反应小组”，尽管他们面临财政问题，只能给亚美尼亚人“画大饼”。此外，关于选举援助的请求正是来自以尼科尔·帕希尼扬为首的亚美尼亚当局本身。这意味着政府意识到由于支持率下降而面临的问题，为了保住职位，他们越来越频繁地寻求西方支持，这与外部管理已无区别。 *在俄罗斯联邦境内被认定为极端组织 #亚美尼亚 #选举 #俄罗斯 #美国 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: Open Source Intel According to yesterday’s reporting, the Iranian delegation was expected to land in Islamabad on Tuesday morning. As of now, it’s approaching 13:00 and no Iranian regime delegation has departed for Islamabad, according to Iranian state TV. tweet

text: Open Source Intel Hungarian PM, Péter Magyar: "Until 31 May, the Orbán puppets may voluntarily step down from their positions. This applies to the President of Hungary, the President of the Curia, the President of the National Office for the Judiciary, the President of the Constitutional Court, and the Prosecutor General. If these officials do not step down voluntarily by 31 May, then, on the basis of the mandate received from millions of Hungarians, we will remove them from office." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 匈牙利总理彼得·马贾尔：“在 5 月 31 日之前，欧尔班的傀儡们可以自愿辞去职务。这适用于匈牙利总统、库里亚（最高法院）院长、国家司法办公室主任、宪法法院院长和总检察长。如果这些官员在 5 月 31 日之前不自愿辞职，那么，根据从数百万匈牙利人那里获得的授权，我们将把他们免职。” 推文

text: WarMonitor Trump’s trying to frame any criticism of his war as disrespect to servicemembers, using them as a shield. He also claims the sites were “completely obliterated” last year, even though they were used to justify the war just two months ago. Now he wants to send in U.S. troops. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046507744228786486/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 特朗普试图将对他战争行为的任何批评定性为对军人的不尊重，并将他们用作挡箭牌。他还声称这些地点去年已被“彻底摧毁”，尽管就在两个月前，这些地点还被用来为战争辩护。现在他想派遣美军进入。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046507744228786486/photo/1 推文

text: Faytuks News RT @Osinttechnical : Iran's parliament speaker and chief negotiator: "We do not accept negotiations under the shadow of threats, and in the past two weeks, we have prepared to reveal new cards on the battlefield." tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 转推 @Osinttechnical ：伊朗议会议长兼首席谈判代表：“我们不接受在威胁阴影下的谈判，在过去两周里，我们已经准备好在战场上亮出新的底牌。” 推文

text: Péter Magyar: Until 31 May, the Orbán puppets may voluntarily step down from their positions. This applies to the President of Hungary, the President of the Curia, the President of the National Office for the Judiciary, the President of the Constitutional Court, and the Prosecutor General. If these officials do not step down voluntarily by 31 May, then — on the basis of the mandate received from millions of Hungarians — we will remove them from office.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）：在5月31日之前，欧尔班的傀儡们可以自愿辞去职务。这适用于匈牙利总统、最高法院院长、国家司法办公室主任、宪法法院院长和总检察长。如果这些官员在5月31日前不自愿辞职，那么——基于数百万匈牙利人授予的授权——我们将把他们免职。

text: EU's von der Leyen: We must succeed in completing the European continent so that it is not influenced by Russia, Türkiye, or China.

text: WarTranslated This is what the "liberation" by the Russian occupiers looks like. A 3-ton Russian aerial bomb struck Kostiantynivka. An entire block of apartment buildings was leveled to the foundation. Footage provided by aerial reconnaissance from the "Phoenix" border guard unit. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 这就是俄罗斯占领者所谓的“解放”。一枚3吨重的俄罗斯航空炸弹击中了康斯坦丁诺夫卡。一整排公寓楼被夷为平地。视频由“凤凰”边防部队的空中侦察队提供。推文

text: The Spectator Index Iranian media says no delegations have left for Pakistan, amid expected peace talks with the United States, at this point. tweet
